Home

Peanut Blossoms

author: Janet Caldwell

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield: 48 cookies

Ingredients

  • 1 3/4 cup flour
  • 1 tsp baking soda
  • 1/2 tsp salt
  • 1/2 cup sugar
  • 1/2 cup brown sugar
  • 1/2 cup shortening
  • 1/2 cup peanut butter
  • 1 egg
  • 2 tbsp milk
  • 1 tbsp vanilla
  • 48 candy kisses

Directions

  1. Combine all ingredients. Roll into balls. Roll balls into sugar.
  2. Bake on ungreased cookie sheet at 375-degrees 10-12 min.
  3. Put kiss on top of cookie while hot.
